testcase.name: alert events list carries timestamp and reasons in id order
temperature and humidity stats ignore readings with no sensor values
net acceleration is null when any axis is missing
verdict is PROBLEMS_DETECTED when any reading is flagged by the Pi
net acceleration strips gravity and picks the largest shock
trip duration is order-independent (readings sorted by id)
verdict is PACKAGE_OK when no reading is flagged
trip duration spans the first to the last reading
reasonLabel translates known codes and falls back to the raw code
verdict is NO_DATA for an empty trip
counts and breakdown match the seeded rows
